BeginDrag

Syntax 1: For ListView controls

Occurs when the user presses the left mouse button in the ListView control and begins dragging.

Event ID

Event IDObject
pbm_lvnbegindragListView

Arguments

ArgumentDescription
indexInteger by value (the index of the ListView item being dragged)

Syntax 2: For TreeView controls

Occurs when the user presses the left mouse button on a label in the TreeView control and begins dragging.

Event ID

Event IDObject
pbm_tvnbegindragTreeView

Arguments

ArgumentDescription
handleLong by value (handle of the TreeView item being dragged)
